violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Please email inspector proof of enrollment in a food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a cooler. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Cooler was relocated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. A new chlorine sanitizing solution was mixed at 50 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

A cutting board was observed stored behind the handwashing sink faucet. Cutting board must not be stored in an area subject to splash to prevent cross contamination. The person in charge cleaned and relocated the cutting board during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023

The cutting boards on the prep unit and cutting block are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
